summary: Comprehensive testing of Auth, Stacks, and Payments features. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Auth system (email+password + Google OAuth), NOWPayments USDT integration, and Peptide Stacks section all working correctly.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - test users created dynamically during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Auth system with JWT (register, login, /me endpoints), 2) Google OAuth via Emergent Auth, 3) NOWPayments USDT lifetime access ($39.99), 4) Peptide Stacks section (43 stacks with categories). All 96 peptides are PRO (is_free=false). Product images show 'Image update in progress' placeholder. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_auth_stacks_payments.py covers all auth, stacks, and payment endpoints.

backend_apis: GET /api/stacks/the-shred-stack - returns stack detail with peptides, goal, how_to_use ✓
GET /api/auth/me - returns user info with has_lifetime_access field ✓
frontend_ui: Clicking Stacks toggle shows 43 stack cards with category filters ✓
Stack detail page shows header, peptides list, locked content ✓
/login page shows email/password form and Google login button ✓
Login flow works and redirects to /protocols ✓
Locked content shows 'Sign In to Unlock' when not logged in ✓
Locked content shows 'Unlock Full Access - $39.99' when logged in without payment ✓
Product cards show 'Image update in progress' placeholder ✓
Navbar shows 'Sign In' button when not logged in ✓
Navbar shows user name and logout button when logged in ✓

notes: NOWPayments uses real API key (ER8A5WS-34840WY-NGHX1VS-7PF129J) - creates real USDT invoices. Google OAuth uses Emergent Auth integration.
